mapper.insert: /* tms-master-center-sql-oracle.xml - insertTTMstCt */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_CT ( CTKEY, CTTYPE, CTNAME, COUNTRYCODE, ADDRID, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, TEL, REGNO, REPORTCTNAME, LOADING_UNIT, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY, CLOSDATE ) VALUES ( #{ctkey}, #{cttype}, #{ctname}, #{lakey}, #{addrid}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{tel}, #{regno}, #{reportctname}, #{loadingUnit}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{closdate} ) ON CONFLICT (CTKEY) DO UPDATE SET CTTYPE = EXCLUDED.CTTYPE, CTNAME = EXCLUDED.CTNAME, ADDRID = EXCLUDED.ADDRID, ZIPCODE = EXCLUDED.ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1 = EXCLUDED.ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2 = EXCLUDED.ADDRESS2, TEL = EXCLUDED.TEL, REGNO = EXCLUDED.REGNO, LOADING_UNIT = EXCLUDED.LOADING_UNIT, REPORTCTNAME = EXCLUDED.REPORTCTNAME, CLOSDATE = EXCLUDED.CLOSDATE, UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY
mapper.update: /* tms-master-center-sql-oracle.xml - updateTTMstCt */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_CT ( CTKEY, CTTYPE, CTNAME, COUNTRYCODE, ADDRID, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, TEL, REGNO, REPORTCTNAME, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY, CLOSDATE ) VALUES ( #{ctkey}, #{cttype}, #{ctname}, #{lakey}, #{addrid}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{tel}, #{regno}, #{reportctname}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{closdate} ) ON CONFLICT (CTKEY) DO UPDATE SET CTTYPE = EXCLUDED.CTTYPE, CTNAME = EXCLUDED.CTNAME, ADDRID = EXCLUDED.ADDRID, ZIPCODE = EXCLUDED.ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1 = EXCLUDED.ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2 = EXCLUDED.ADDRESS2, TEL = EXCLUDED.TEL, REGNO = EXCLUDED.REGNO, LOADING_UNIT = #{loadingUnit}, REPORTCTNAME = EXCLUDED.REPORTCTNAME, CLOSDATE = EXCLUDED.CLOSDATE, UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY, DELYN = #{delyn}
